pr.title: Record: Fused MLP (Triton+CUTLASS EVT) + Fast Causal N-Gram Tilt & Subword Certainty (3-seed mean)

output.summary: Fuses Triton TMA and CUTLASS EVT MLP kernels, ups MLP to 3.5× int6 GPTQ, and adds fast causal n-gram tilt as sparse memory for repeats.
techniques: Fused Triton TMA forward + CUTLASS EVT backward MLP kernels
All-int6 GPTQ paired with wider (3.5×) MLP
Fast causal n-gram tilt acting as sparse auxiliary memory
